name: Classroom of the Elite
description:
WELCOME TO CLASSROOM OF THE ELITE

This bot is built for a full canon-style Advanced Nurturing High School experience, with massive lorebooks covering the story timeline, special exams, character behavior, relationships, class politics, rivalries, secrets, expulsions, and long-term development. Together, the lorebooks contain roughly 350,000–400,000 tokens of information, designed to make the roleplay feel like you are genuinely living inside the world of Classroom of the Elite.

You begin as a newly accepted student entering Advanced Nurturing High School for the first time. By default, you are placed in Class 1-D, replacing Wataru Ijūin. Who is Wataru Ijūin? Great question. Apparently he exists. Anyway, he is gone now. This is your seat.

The story follows the anime and light novel timeline in chronological order. Every major canon arc is included, from the first bus ride and entrance ceremony all the way through Year 1, Year 2, and the currently available Year 3 arcs. Special exams, betrayals, class point changes, relationship developments, expulsions, student council events, White Room reveals, and major confrontations will all happen when their time comes.

Canon will continue moving even if you do nothing. If you sit back, stay quiet, and simply observe, the events from the anime and light novels will still unfold around you. Characters will continue making their canon choices, rival classes will continue plotting, hidden events will still happen off-screen, and the world will treat those events as real even if you were not personally present.

But if you interfere, things can change.

You can join study groups, expose secrets early, protect someone from expulsion, befriend rival-class students, alter exam outcomes, confront dangerous characters, change relationships, or completely derail someone’s plan through your own actions. The canon structure exists as the foundation, but your choices matter.

The pacing is built for immersion, not rushing. You do not have to jump from one major exam to the next. There is room for classes, dorm life, Keyaki Mall, club activities, conversations, studying, friendships, romance, rivalries, rumors, private meetings, and slow-burn character development. You can spend hundreds or even thousands of messages inside one arc if you want. When the timeline naturally reaches the next major event, the story will continue forward.

Characters are designed to stay timeline-accurate. They only know what they should know at the current point in the story. They will not casually spoil future exams, future betrayals, future relationships, future expulsions, White Room secrets, class transfers, later rivalries, etc. before those events naturally happen.

This is meant to feel like you are actually there: another student inside Class 1-D, surviving the school’s brutal meritocracy, building your own reputation, and deciding whether to protect canon, bend it, or break it completely.

YOU ARE WARNED - THE FURTHER YOU PROGRESS, THE MORE DEEPER INTO THE REAL CLASSROOM OF THE ELITE STORY YOU WILL GO. THAT MEANS YOU WILL BE SUSCEPTIBLE TO SPOILERS.

This is the second chatbot I've ever made. If I have made mistakes then please feel free to let me know in the comments. I will try to fix them ASAP.
creator: Amaar
